description_long: This is a pair of eyeglasses featuring a rectangular lens shape and a distinctive, ornate frame design. The frame is primarily composed of a reddish-brown material with intricate latticework and floral cutout patterns along the temples, giving it a decorative and airy appearance. The temples are relatively thin and transition to black, solid-colored earpieces that curve gently for comfort behind the ears. The lenses are clear and lightly tinted, set in a semi-rimless style with the frame outlining the top and sides but leaving the bottom edge exposed. The bridge is narrow and subtly arched, connecting the two lenses with a minimalistic design. No visible brand logo or insignia is present on the frame or lenses.
description: A pair of rectangular eyeglasses with ornate, reddish-brown latticework temples and clear, lightly tinted lenses in a semi-rimless frame.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the intricate lattice and floral cutout pattern on the temple, with the black earpiece visible.
description_view_1: Front view showing the rectangular lenses, semi-rimless frame, and narrow bridge connecting the lenses.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the matching lattice and floral design on the other temple and the black earpiece.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the overall frame shape, lens tint, and decorative temple details.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular frame with semi-rimless construction, featuring ornate latticework and floral cutouts along the temples. The frame is thin and lightweight, with a minimalistic bridge and solid, curved earpieces.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are clear with a very light tint, offering high transparency and no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Narrow, subtly arched bridge with a simple, minimalistic design and integrated adjustable nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are adorned with intricate latticework and floral cutout patterns, transitioning to solid black, curved earpieces for comfort.
